title: Craftable Vault Recipe
description: Now you can craft Vault and claim more rewards
body:
# Craftable Vaults

**Build Your Own Treasure Trove **
Tired of scouring the world hoping to stumble upon a Vault? Same. This datapack lets you craft your own — no luck, no long walks, just instant access to the loot, the challenge, and the glory.

Note: “Vault Recipe” is a custom recipe added by the datapack.

**🧠 Why It’s Better**
Because adventure should be accessible. Whether you're farming rare gear, testing your skills, or just want to create your own dungeon experience, this pack puts the Vault in your hands — literally.

**📦 How to Use:**

1. Download the .zip
   
2. Drop it into your world’s datapacks/ folder
   
3. Type /reload in-game

4. Craft your Vault and unlock the riches

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
